## edu-cli learning-plan rollback

Rollback a learning plan to a previous version (回滚学习计划到历史版本)

```
edu-cli learning-plan rollback [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --comment string   Rollback comment
  -h, --help             help for rollback
      --plan-id uint     Learning plan ID (required)
      --version int      Target version number (required)
```

* [edu-cli learning-plan](edu-cli_learning-plan.md)	 - Manage student learning plans (学生学习计划管理)
